TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tmangux abax ginringan qa mbhkux payat kayal qani ga tmangux abax, garing saying byaling cyugal ski magal ryax ga t'aring qa tmangux abax qani. garing magal byaling magal ski pitu ryax gas i say maha tmsuqan qa tmangux abax qani la, tmangux abax laga si baqi maha sinpngan ryax qa gaga na sm'atu la Iyik qa tmangux abax qani, skura tltu qa cinbwanan qani ga nyan scobih hayi wagi, nyan si bnwan wagi krryax, ana kayal qani ga nyan mkilux uyi, nyan msqsya qa tlaka qani, baq hmor qsya qa llyung uyi. tmangux abax laga garing tmangux qabax abax ghoniq ro k'man uyi la, nyan si sphpah qa phpah qani, nyan sinhelax qabax qa qsinux qani, kpiyux sinbtwan qa qqsinux qani ga wayal sbatu uyi la. qbhniq qani ga shri plkan binah na˙san, musa skura tltu na rroq qa musa mbhuyax kya nanak, mllamu na qsinux qsinux ga twang qsliq smoya mipu, tliqan kilux qa kayal ro piny'ugan na cinbwanan qani ga nyan maga; pin'yugan "inlungan" na cquliq ki pin'aaray yaw na hi ta uyi.
S.PHON: tmaŋux aβax ɣinriŋan qa mβħkux pajat kajal qani ɣa tmaŋux aβax, ɣariŋ s~ɕajiŋ βjaliŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕki maɣal rjax ɣa tʔariŋ qa tmaŋux aβax qani. ɣariŋ maɣal βjaliŋ maɣal s~ɕki pitu rjax ɣas~ɕ i s~ɕaj maħa tms~ɕuqan qa tmaŋux aβax qani la, tmaŋux aβax laɣa s~ɕi βaqi maħa s~ɕinpŋan rjax qa ɣaɣa na s~ɕmʔatu la ijik qa tmaŋux aβax qani, s~ɕkura tltu qa ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani ɣa njan s~ɕʦ~ʨoβiħ ħaji waɣi, njan s~ɕi βnwan waɣi krrjax, ana kajal qani ɣa njan mkilux uji, njan ms~ɕqs~ɕja qa tlaka qani, βaq ħmor qs~ɕja qa lljuŋ uji. tmaŋux aβax laɣa ɣariŋ tmaŋux qaβax aβax ɣħoniq ro kʔman uji la, njan s~ɕi s~ɕpħpaħ qa pħpaħ qani, njan s~ɕinħelax qaβax qa qs~ɕinux qani, kpijux s~ɕinβtwan qa qqs~ɕinux qani ɣa wajal s~ɕβatu uji la. qβħniq qani ɣa s~ɕħri plkan βinaħ na*s~ɕan, mus~ɕa s~ɕkura tltu na rroq qa mus~ɕa mβħujax kja nanak, mllamu na qs~ɕinux qs~ɕinux ɣa twaŋ qs~ɕliq s~ɕmoja mipu, tliqan kilux qa kajal ro pinjʔuɣan na ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani ɣa njan maɣa; pinʔjuɣan "inluŋan" na ʦ~ʨquliq ki pinʔaaraj jaw na ħi ta uji.
S.FORM: tmangux abax ginringan qa mbhkux payat kayal qani ga tmangux abax, garing saying byaling cyugal ski magal ryax ga t'aring qa tmangux abax qani. garing magal byaling magal ski pitu ryax gas i say maha tmsuqan qa tmangux abax qani la, tmangux abax laga si baqi maha sinpngan ryax qa gaga na sm'atu la Iyik qa tmangux abax qani, skura tltu qa cinbwanan qani ga nyan scobih hayi wagi, nyan si bnwan wagi krryax, ana kayal qani ga nyan mkilux uyi, nyan msqsya qa tlaka qani, baq hmor qsya qa llyung uyi. tmangux abax laga garing tmangux qabax abax ghoniq ro k'man uyi la, nyan si sphpah qa phpah qani, nyan sinhelax qabax qa qsinux qani, kpiyux sinbtwan qa qqsinux qani ga wayal sbatu uyi la. qbhniq qani ga shri plkan binah na˙san, musa skura tltu na rroq qa musa mbhuyax kya nanak, mllamu na qsinux qsinux ga twang qsliq smoya mipu, tliqan kilux qa kayal ro piny'ugan na cinbwanan qani ga nyan maga; pin'yugan "inlungan" na cquliq ki pin'aaray yaw na hi ta uyi.
S.PHON: tmaŋux aβax ɣinriŋan qa mβħkux pajat kajal qani ɣa tmaŋux aβax, ɣariŋ s~ɕajiŋ βjaliŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕki maɣal rjax ɣa tʔariŋ qa tmaŋux aβax qani. ɣariŋ maɣal βjaliŋ maɣal s~ɕki pitu rjax ɣas~ɕ i s~ɕaj maħa tms~ɕuqan qa tmaŋux aβax qani la, tmaŋux aβax laɣa s~ɕi βaqi maħa s~ɕinpŋan rjax qa ɣaɣa na s~ɕmʔatu la ijik qa tmaŋux aβax qani, s~ɕkura tltu qa ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani ɣa njan s~ɕʦ~ʨoβiħ ħaji waɣi, njan s~ɕi βnwan waɣi krrjax, ana kajal qani ɣa njan mkilux uji, njan ms~ɕqs~ɕja qa tlaka qani, βaq ħmor qs~ɕja qa lljuŋ uji. tmaŋux aβax laɣa ɣariŋ tmaŋux qaβax aβax ɣħoniq ro kʔman uji la, njan s~ɕi s~ɕpħpaħ qa pħpaħ qani, njan s~ɕinħelax qaβax qa qs~ɕinux qani, kpijux s~ɕinβtwan qa qqs~ɕinux qani ɣa wajal s~ɕβatu uji la. qβħniq qani ɣa s~ɕħri plkan βinaħ na*s~ɕan, mus~ɕa s~ɕkura tltu na rroq qa mus~ɕa mβħujax kja nanak, mllamu na qs~ɕinux qs~ɕinux ɣa twaŋ qs~ɕliq s~ɕmoja mipu, tliqan kilux qa kajal ro pinjʔuɣan na ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani ɣa njan maɣa; pinʔjuɣan "inluŋan" na ʦ~ʨquliq ki pinʔaaraj jaw na ħi ta uji.
